hard_constraints: Do not change time stop 12 days.
Do not open parallel redesign tracks.
Do not change the official baseline.

measurement_variables.usage: Primary fast market regime moving average.
Primary slow market regime moving average.
Previous aligned trading-day value of ihsg_ema50 for the same regime series.

layer1_narrow_strengthening_definition.pass_rule: Layer 1 passes only when ihsg_ema50 is above ihsg_ema200 and the current aligned ihsg_ema50 is above prev_ihsg_ema50 on the same evaluation date.
layer1_narrow_strengthening_definition.fail_rule: Layer 1 fails if ihsg_ema50 <= ihsg_ema200 or if ihsg_ema50 <= prev_ihsg_ema50 on the aligned evaluation date.
layer1_narrow_strengthening_definition.pipeline_touchpoint: Apply the strengthened regime gate at the existing Layer 1 regime evaluation step before Phase 1 base signals are allowed to continue to downstream entry processing, Layer 4 sizing, and Layer 5 exit handling.
what_does_not_change: Phase 1 base signal generation logic does not change.
Layer 5 ATR14 x 2.5, trailing logic, and time stop 12 days do not change.
regime_tightening_boundary: This is a single additional slope-up requirement inside the existing Layer 1 family.
It does not add a new filter family outside Layer 1.
It does not introduce entry confirmation logic.
It does not introduce a large eligibility redesign.
It does not combine buffer thresholds, EMA200 slope rules, or multiple strengthening rules.

notes: Only one active hypothesis family is authorized.
No combined redesign with entry confirmation, eligibility, freshness, or exit changes is authorized.

disallowed_changes: Layer 1 redesign outside the existing market regime family.
Combined redesign with any other gate or filter.
sequencing_rules: Definition freeze must complete before any layer1_narrow_strengthening execution setup begins.
Do not combine two redesigns in one experiment pass.
exit_criteria: Layer 1 narrow strengthening is defined explicitly as a single official regime-tightening concept.
The measurement variables and pass/fail rule are frozen without ambiguity.
The pipeline touchpoint is defined explicitly.
The roadmap points directly to layer1_narrow_strengthening execution setup after definition freeze.
Paper trading remains blocked and retest remains blocked.
